name: Pre-Sin
description: The world as it was before Sin's discovery — ordinary history, before the Apotheosis Serum existed.

name: Pre-TDay
description: Sin develops the serum and founds SinCorp in secret. The old world's final years, unaware of what is coming.

name: TDay
description: Transformation Day. The serum is released worldwide. The single moment that divides all of Sinverse history.

name: Post-Apotheosis
description: The Chaos and its immediate aftermath. The old world collapses; the Transformed begin consolidating power.

name: The Reconstruction
description: The mega-cities rise and the Wilds are abandoned. A new order takes physical shape across the world.

name: The Giantess Renaissance
description: Transformed society matures into its own culture. The Resistance organises in the shadows of a confident new world.

name: Project Sylph
description: The present day. SinCorp's most significant current initiative drives events forward into uncharted territory.
